sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n81084" key="perianqe/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περιανθ-έω</orth>, <sense id="n81084.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bloom</tr_>: hence, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">glow all round</tr_>, of heat, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.648a</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
